allow:
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing

function New-MaterialShieldIcon {
    param \([int]$Size, [string]$OutputPath\)
    
    $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($Size, $Size\)
    $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\)
    $g.SmoothingMode = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.SmoothingMode]::AntiAlias
    $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::Transparent\)
    
    # Scale factor from 960x960 viewbox to our icon size
    # The shield viewbox is 960x960, path is centered
    $scale = $Size / 960.0
    $offsetY = $Size  # Because viewbox is 0 to -960 \(negative Y\)
    
    # Draw a simple shield shape manually scaled
    $margin = $Size * 0.12
    $cx = $Size / 2.0
    
    # Shield outline points \(simplified from Material Design\)
    $path = New-Object System.Drawing.Drawing2D.GraphicsPath
    
    # Top center
    $topY = $margin
    $bottomY = $Size - $margin
    $sideY = $Size * 0.55
    $halfW = \($Size / 2.0\) - $margin
    
    $path.AddLine\($cx, $topY, \($cx + $halfW\), \($topY + $Size * 0.08\)\)
    $path.AddLine\(\($cx + $halfW\), \($topY + $Size * 0.08\), \($cx + $halfW\), $sideY\)
    $path.AddBezier\(\($cx + $halfW\), $sideY, \($cx + $halfW * 0.8\), \($bottomY - $Size * 0.05\), \($cx + $halfW * 0.3\), \($bottomY - $Size * 0.02\), $cx, $bottomY\)
    $path.AddBezier\($cx, $bottomY, \($cx - $halfW * 0.3\), \($bottomY - $Size * 0.02\), \($cx - $halfW * 0.8\), \($bottomY - $Size * 0.05\), \($cx - $halfW\), $sideY\)
    $path.AddLine\(\($cx - $halfW\), $sideY, \($cx - $halfW\), \($topY + $Size * 0.08\)\)
    $path.CloseFigure\(\)
    
    # Fill shield with dark slate blue
    $fillBrush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255, 30, 41, 59\)\)
    $g.FillPath\($fillBrush, $path\)
    
    # Draw checkmark inside
    $pen = New-Object System.Drawing.Pen\([System.Drawing.Color]::White, [math]::Max\(1.5, $Size * 0.08\)\)
    $pen.StartCap = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.LineCap]::Round
    $pen.EndCap = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.LineCap]::Round
    $pen.LineJoin = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.LineJoin]::Round
    
    $checkPath = New-Object System.Drawing.Drawing2D.GraphicsPath
    $checkX1 = $cx - $halfW * 0.35
    $checkY1 = $Size * 0.45
    $checkX2 = $cx - $halfW * 0.05
    $checkY2 = $Size * 0.58
    $checkX3 = $cx + $halfW * 0.35
    $checkY3 = $Size * 0.32
    
    $g.DrawLine\($pen, $checkX1, $checkY1, $checkX2, $checkY2\)
    $g.DrawLine\($pen, $checkX2, $checkY2, $checkX3, $checkY3\)
    
    $g.Dispose\(\)
    $bmp.Save\($OutputPath, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\)
    $bmp.Dispose\(\)
    Write-Host ""Created: $OutputPath \($Size x $Size\)""
}

New-MaterialShieldIcon -Size 16 -OutputPath ""chrome-extension/icons/icon16.png""
New-MaterialShieldIcon -Size 48 -OutputPath ""chrome-extension/icons/icon48.png""
New-MaterialShieldIcon -Size 128 -OutputPath ""chrome-extension/icons/icon128.png""
')
